name: get_performance_report
description: Run a Google Ads Query Language (GAQL) query to retrieve performance metrics across any resource. You can pull impressions, clicks, cost, conversions, CTR, CPC, and more. Supports segmentation by date, device, network, and other dimensions.

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: The Google Ads customer ID (without dashes).

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: A GAQL query. SELECT metrics and resource fields FROM a resource, with optional WHERE filters, ORDER BY, and LIMIT.
parameters.example: SELECT campaign.name, segments.date, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.conversions, metrics.cost_micros FROM campaign WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_30_DAYS ORDER BY metrics.cost_micros DESC

body.query: SELECT campaign.name, segments.date, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.conversions, metrics.cost_micros FROM campaign WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_30_DAYS ORDER BY metrics.cost_micros DESC
